conversations.content:
I will be arriving in Paris on Sunday. Can you please provide me the the name of a restaurant which serves French cuisine that open on Sunday? Recommend me the restaurant with the best rating.
Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.

<function_thought>
To fulfill the user's request for a restaurant in Paris that serves French cuisine and is open on Sunday, I will first gather a list of all restaurants in Paris. After that, I will need to determine their cuisine types, check their opening hours, and ultimately get their ratings and addresses. I will start by retrieving all the restaurants in Paris.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_restaurants_in_city(city="Paris")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Restaurant in Paris: New Israeli Restaurant
Breizh Café
New Asiaway
Le Baratin
Bistrot Paul Bert
Royal Panda
The yard
China Garden
Miznon
Chez L'Ami Jean

I have obtained a list of restaurants in Paris. Next, I will gather the cuisine types for these restaurants to identify which ones serve French cuisine. 
</function_thought>

- Chez L'Ami Jean: Closed on Sundays
